behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all key files (yaml-config-schema.ts, lint-tool-names.ts, tool-name-validation.test.ts, SKILL.md, handbook md), constants TOOL_NAME_PATTERN/FEATURE_NAME_PATTERN (implicitly via behavior), length 52, accept/reject examples, TOOL_MAP/GENERATED_TOOL_MAP.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior and constraints, not exact code or line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check regex behavior via Node execution and substring presence of constant names mandated by the spec; alternative valid implementations that satisfy the naming/length rules would still pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run pnpm typecheck/lint/test/build and execute Node to evaluate regex patterns against sample names.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stub implementations would fail: pattern tests require specific accept/reject outcomes, and build/typecheck/lint/unit tests must pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover pattern constants, zod schema refs, lint JSON validation, vitest file existence, docs updates, and build gates.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section headers (Gates, fail-to-pass behavioral, documentation).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the relevant files (expected for the task) without specifying exact lines.
